pi_items.verified_value: GUI automation - agent must interact with ActivInspire GUI to create flipchart
pi_items.source: Task description describes interactive steps with GUI (File > New Flipchart, select Text tool, click canvas, type text, File > Save As)

privileged_info_summary: The add_text_annotation task requires an agent to create a new ActivInspire flipchart and add the text 'Welcome to Today's Lesson' to it, then save it to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/lesson_with_text.flipchart. ActivInspire is Promethean's proprietary educational whiteboard software. Flipchart files are ZIP archives containing XML. All metadata values (expected_text, expected_filename, expected_directory, expected_full_path) are explicitly defined in the task description. The data is synthetic - created during task execution, not from external sources.
